name: Master Vorgath the Stone-Forged
dialogue: So. Veyra, Selene, and Ignis stepped aside for you.
Most who reach this stone don't. The cave eats them, or my students do.
I forged this sanctum from rubble after the surface burned. Down here we test what lasts.
Show me what the cave taught you. Don't insult me with anything less.
preBattleLine: Vorgath rises. The chamber goes still. Even the dripping water seems to hold its breath.
postDefeatDialogue: Vorgath kneels and pounds his fist into the cave floor once.
He stands. "The road from here is your own — but the stone remembers your name."
